title: Dungeons Content UI
body: Reworks the entire game interface to a more sophisticated and pleasant Dungeons style, menus, buttons, font, and panorama - The resource pack is taken from the base of the **Dungeons Content** mod as an addition to the main mod.![GUI Demostration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e449932569185bc0f830c2c7aeba068df28729a2.jpeg)
